summary: Iteration 325: Observatory VISUAL OVERHAUL - Full-bleed planetary imagery. ALL 16 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Full-bleed Earth image background (Unsplash URL) visible behind content at 70% opacity. (2) Glass blur panels with backdrop-filter: blur(12px) on detail panels. (3) Sonify toggle: 'Activate Earth's Frequency (194.2Hz)' → click → 'Active' → click → 'Activate'. (4) Audio visualizer bars (53 bars) visible when frequency active. (5) Deep Sky tab switches to nebula background. (6) Star cards with Volume2/VolumeX sonify toggles. (7) Live Events expand with descriptions. (8) Background image changes when switching between Orrery and Deep Sky tabs. (9) Atmospheric particles (20 particles) float over imagery. Regression: Sovereign Circle lobby, Light Therapy 7 colors, Herbology 14 herbs, Login via /auth all working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Observatory visual overhaul complete. Key features verified: (1) PLANET_VISUALS object contains Unsplash image URLs for each planet. (2) AnimatePresence layer renders planet image at 70% opacity behind all content. (3) DEEP_SKY_BG constant for nebula background on Deep Sky tab. (4) Glass-blur panels use backdrop-filter: blur(12px). (5) AtmosphericParticles component renders 20-50 floating particles. (6) useChaosOscillator hook for toggle-based audio with chaos drift. Login route is /auth (not /login).
